title: Praxis PLT: Early Childhood (5621) - 200-Item Diagnostic Bank
description: Two 100-item diagnostics, a 70-item selected-response simulation, four case-response workshops, and native learning support for beginning early-childhood educators.
contentReview: 200 source-reviewed items; independent early-childhood educator, family, accessibility, legal, and psychometric review pending
simulationNote: The official 5621 test contains 70 selected-response and four constructed-response questions related to two case histories in one 120-minute session. This simulation reserves 50 minutes for separate case-analysis workshops; AlloFlow does not score written responses.
disclaimer: Independent preparation material, not affiliated with or endorsed by ETS, CCSSO, or NAEYC. Results and workshop self-checks are not official forms, constructed-response scores, scaled scores, pass predictions, licenses, developmental screenings, diagnoses, disability or accommodation decisions, legal advice, or substitutes for current requirements.
